problem id: b61470ef
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) XOR NOT ROT(6)) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  00101011 -> 01100011
  11100000 -> 00000111
  01100001 -> 01100101
  01000111 -> 10100001
  00010010 -> 01011111
  01100010 -> 10100011
  00001100 -> 11100100
  01111010 -> 10010101
  11111010 -> 10110111
  11000111 -> 10000011

query: 00100000
predicted answer: 10110111
